about_item: ONE HANDED DOG HYDRATION: Squeeze the bottle to instantly fill the built-in drinking bowl for your pup, then release to let unused water drain back into the bottle. Perfect for walks, car rides, or anywhere on the go.
BUILT IN BOWL: Public water bowls can contain harmful pathogens, travel water bowls are an inconvenience to use. The attached bowl allows your dog to drink without needing a separate travel bowl.
PORTABLE & EASY TO CARRY: Compact design fits most standard car or bicycle cup holders, making it easy to take along on road trips, long walks, and daily outings with your dog.

BPA-FREE & FOOD SAFE MATERIALS: Made with durable, BPA-free polypropylene so your pet can drink safely from fresh water you bring from home. The bottle is also top-rack dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

DESIGNED FOR ACTIVE DOGS & OWNERS: Holds about 20 oz of water and includes a removable strap that can be used as a handle or attached to a backpack, leash, or belt for hands-free carrying on any adventure.

summary.text: Customers find this water dispenser to be the best dog waterer ever, particularly praising its portability for travel and long walks. They appreciate its ease of use, noting it's much easier than traditional bowls, and find it handy for outings. The design receives positive feedback, and customers love using it with their pets. The leak-proof and water retention aspects receive mixed reviews - while some say it doesn't leak, others report water seeping back into the bottle.

insights.title: Design
insights.summary: Customers like the design of the water dispenser, describing it as the best dog waterer ever.

examples.snippet: This is a great product wish I thought of it!
Great idea but not well made. The threaded fittings are poor at best, and you really have to squeeze fully in order to get enough water into the bowl.
This is a good product but has a couple down sides. First, it's advertised as a one-handed bottle, which is somewhat true, but it's hard to do....
Great, no spills, fits in cup holder. Works GREAT! My sister thinks it looks like a breast pump but I could care less bc ot WORKS

insights.summary: Customers find the water dispenser highly portable, noting it's great for traveling with pets, particularly at the dog park and during hikes.

insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the water retention of the dispenser: while some report that water goes back inside the bottle, others mention that it does not stay in the top.

authors_reviews.title: Super travel dog drinking device
authors_reviews.text: I think this is great item. I had problem with 1st one the company fixed it and said I didn't have to send back the broken one so we threw it away then AMAZON SAID,if I dont send back the one I threw away I'll be charged 35 some dollars. So I don't know i have to call amazon to see if they followed thru on that. But the new item works great and very handy to give your dog water without having to drag a bowl and water jug. Highway if you see this I love your product and you were great ! Amazon how ever tried to bend me over for not returning the product you told me to throw away. So heads up about the company thats selling your product. Thank you tho your company was great !
authors_reviews.author: tuffnut

authors_reviews.title: Best Way to Provide Water to Pups on a Walk
authors_reviews.text: Great way to provide water on walks with your pet without having to open a bowl first. Just squeeze and the built in cup fills with water. When finished, any remaining water returns in to the container - no drips! My 2 Cairn Terriers walk at least a mile at a time and always want a drink when it's hot outside. Easiest way to do that!!! Very good quality/durability. Highly recommend it!
authors_reviews.author: Barbara B.

authors_reviews.title: Great On-The-Go Water Bottle For Dogs!!
authors_reviews.text: I needed a good way to be able to give my fur-baby which my 2 girls are like my children. They go almost every where with me and my husband; and just having a cup orBowl with water or to put water in wasn’t working good. This water bottle is amazing; u fill it up and screw the lid on it. When one of the babies want water; we just squeeze the bottle a little bit and it lets water out in the top and the baby drinks it and u can squeeze more to keep putting more water up in the top till they are satisfied. And it doesn’t leak if it is turned over so no mess in our vehicle. Great for travel and just on the go with ur pet. We love ours so good, we are gonna order more; I’m thinking of atleast 2 more. Get different colors too so we know which is which and can have one for each vehicle and an extra one for anything else we may need it for. It is well worth the money and is made good also. And our little fur-babies love it!!
authors_reviews.author: Mortieleeinman

authors_reviews.title: Handy Dog Water Bottle
authors_reviews.text: This is a great gadget that makes it easy to give my dogs water on the go. It fits very easily in a car cup holder, easy to clean and simple to use. You just squeeze the bottle and it fills the top which acts as a bowl. It took a long time to be delivered to me. I think it was over a month. This wasn't really an issue just more of an observation: the excess water your dog doesn't drink out of the bowl will have to get dumped since it doesn't seem to drain back in to the bottle. This is fine since if they slobber all over it I don't want it to drain back in but when they decide not to drink after I've squeezed the bottle then I have to unscrew the top and dump the water back in the bottle or dump the water on the floor. Ive learned to wait to squeeze the bottle until they have their mouth over the bowl. The bottle is a good size for one or two dogs but I wish it was a little bit longer to fit more water. Also it would be nice if it came with an over the shoulder strap so it would be easier to carry on long walks. One other draw back is when it's almost empty the bottle makes a suction sound which scares one of my dogs so I have to remember when it gets low I can only give it to one of my dogs not both. If my one dog didn't get scared I would probably give it a five. The drawbacks are very minor, otherwise this is a very convenient tool to give your dogs water quickly.
authors_reviews.author: JJ

authors_reviews.title: Great idea, Needs work.
authors_reviews.text: I love the concer of this product and the idea behind it but it needs alot of work.I have a Service Dog and this is perfect for when we leave house.Down side.... It leaks through the lid. If you’re needing to pack this inside of a bag or take it anywhere other than on a walk outside, it can get frustrating having to clean up water all the time.Also, it is not dishwasher safe.If you forget to empty remaining water (if any) from the container after use, it will discolor the container within a day or two.I’m unsure if this is Bpa-free so i’m going back to check for sure. Wouldn't surprise me if it’s not.Currently looking for something similar that is dishwasher safe, bpa-free, doesn’t leak etc.If this water bottle did not suck in all the remaining water after my dog is done drinking, I would have not bought this in the first place.Like I said, great idea, but needs alot of work.
authors_reviews.author: MD

authors_reviews.title: Best one on the market
authors_reviews.text: The advantage that these have over similar looking products, is if your pet doesn’t drink all the water in the reservoir the excess water will drain back into the bottle. With others we have tried they don’t have that feature and you then have to find a drain where you can dump the water if you happen to be using indoors.
authors_reviews.author: Don Mauseth

authors_reviews.title: Great Water Bottle for my puppy!
authors_reviews.text: This is the best water bottle I've ever seen. I have it filled, from my kitchen water despenser, and finally he'll drink some water for me!! If Cooper goes with me in the car, his water bottle goes too . He loves it ! So, that in turn makes Mommy happy 😊
authors_reviews.author: MagicsMom

other_countries_reviews.title: Great product
other_countries_reviews.text: Excellent product, easy to use and easy to carry while hiking.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: The rim is too big and water spills down my cheeks onto my shirt.
other_countries_reviews.text: Great for small to medium dogs. A little bulky to Cary around but in the car it is perfect.
other_countries_reviews.author: Dave Angel

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfection.
other_countries_reviews.text: I use this product to conveinantly have water for my dogs when we are out. I Love it and so do my fur babies.
other_countries_reviews.author: Holly Chamberlain

other_countries_reviews.title: It's not baaaaad...
other_countries_reviews.text: I saw this bottle in a tiktok video and thought I'd try it out. It looked interesting. I have two Labs and traditionally we use the ol' "Gulpy" dog water bottles.This bottle is ok. My dogs had no problem drinking out of it. I was a little disappointed when I put it in my backpack and it started slowly leaking when it slipped to an angled position or further. I thought the "squeeze technology" meant that there was a mechanism that blocked the spout and didn't allow water to go through until it was squeezed.The squeezing feature works great, however with two large dogs I think the double-squeezing will wear this down quicker than users with one dog. I used this bottle on two outings and I'm already concerned for it's structural integrity. Perhaps more ideal for smaller dogs who don't chug as much as mine!
other_countries_reviews.author: Johnny8594
